types:type.name: recordInputCSVFile
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type recordInputCSVFile = Array<{| ID: String, NAME: String, AGE: String, POSTCODE: String|}> {"header": "true", "headerLineNumber": "0", "isQuotedString": "false"}

types:type.name: recordOutputJSONFile
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type recordOutputJSONFile = Array<{| EMP_ID: Number {"typeId": "int"}, EMP_NAME: String, EMP_AGE: Number {"typeId": "int"}, EMP_POSTCODE: Number {"typeId": "int"}|}> {"example": "[{\\\"EMP_ID\\\":2000,\\\"EMP_NAME\\\":\\\"JOHN\\\",\\\"EMP_AGE\\\":25,\\\"EMP_POSTCODE\\\":1010},{\\\"EMP_ID\\\":2000,\\\"EMP_NAME\\\":\\\"JOHN\\\",\\\"EMP_AGE\\\":25,\\\"EMP_POSTCODE\\\":1010}]"}
